items.name: Mediterranean Dip Trio
items.description: House-made labneh, baba ghanoush, muhammara, and hummus. Accompanied with turmeric pickled cauliflower, olives, and warm pita.

items.name: Charcuterie & Cheese Board
items.description: St. Lawrence market cured meats and artisanal cheeses, house condiments and grilled focaccia. Two cheese, two meat selection.

items.name: Crispy Calamari
items.description: Chickpea flour fried calamari, bruschetta, spicy aioli, frisée.

items.name: Chicken Pinchos
items.description: Andalusian inspired marinated chicken skewers, mojo verde, mojo picon. Served with lemon and fresh pita.

items.name: Bruschetta Focaccia
items.description: Grilled rustic rosemary focaccia topped with house made bruschetta mix, Mozzarella and Grana Padano.

items.name: Spicy Catalan Mussels
items.description: Paprika and saffron infused sliced chorizo, white wine, confit tomatoes. Served with grilled focaccia.

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: Romaine, house made croutons, crispy capers, Parmigiano-Reggiano and HotHouse Caesar dressing.

items.name: Horiatiki Salad
items.description: Green bell pepper, cucumbers, tomatoes, crisp red onions, kalamata olives, marinated Feta cheese, Greek vinaigrette.

items.name: Caprese Salad
items.description: Blistered Roma tomatoes, fior di latte, fresh basil, pomegranate seeds, pomegranate molasses.

items.name: Cauliflower Bowl
items.description: Blanched and fried cauliflower, hummus, Egyptian hazelnut dukkha, lemon tahini dressing, fresh mint.

items.name: Tuna Niçoise
items.description: Grilled rare tuna, compressed little gem and Boston bibb lettuce, green beans, fingerling potatoes, confit tomatoes.

items.name: Mediterranean Bowl
items.description: Choice of chilled grilled chicken breast, ahi tuna, red prawns, or Mediterranean tofu. Jasmine rice, avocado, kalamata olives.

items.name: Lamb Burger
items.description: Spiced Ontario ground lamb, caramelized onions and peppers, whipped feta cheese, tzatziki. Served Mediterranean style.

items.name: Halloumi Burger
items.description: Deep-fried, golden-brown halloumi cheese, briami vegetables, basil pesto, garlic aioli, fresh pea shoots.

items.name: Shrimp Po' Boy
items.description: Smoked paprika shrimp remoulade, brioche long bun, hothouse tomato, Boston bibb lettuce, spicy aioli.

items.name: HotHouse Burger
items.description: Roasted garlic aioli, house smoked gouda cheese, Boston bibb lettuce, tomato, 100% ground Canadian AAA beef.

items.name: Rigatoni Bolognese
items.description: Beef Bolognese, Basilico, red wine, local handmade Rigatoni.

items.name: Crab Mezze Luna
items.description: Local handmade mezze luna filled with rich mascarpone and crab, nestled in a brown butter corn emulsion.

items.name: Cappelletti Rosé
items.description: Ricotta stuffed cappelletti in a rosé sauce topped with mozzarella and cheddar.

items.name: Seafood Spaghetti
items.description: Local handmade spaghetti, arrabiata tomato sauce, mussels, clams, shrimp, squid, confit tomatoes, basil.

items.name: Lasagna
items.description: Ricotta cheese, spinach, beef ragù, tomato basil, mozzarella.

items.name: Mushroom Gnocchi
items.description: Cremini, button, and portabella mushroom demi, confit cherry tomatoes, local ricotta gnocchi.

items.name: Paella
items.description: Traditional Bomba rice, Spanish saffron sofrito, in-house smoked chicken, grilled chorizo, manila clams.

items.name: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
items.description: Local handmade spaghetti, aglio e olio, roasted artichoke hearts, kalamata olives, fresh spinach.

items.name: Atlantic Salmon
items.description: Pan-seared Organic Newfoundland Atlantic salmon, lemon scented rice, butter poached broccolini, sauce vierge.

items.name: Moroccan Chicken Skewers
items.description: Moroccan spice marinated grilled chicken skewer, served with lemon scented rice, herb fingerling potatoes.

items.name: Picanha Steak
items.description: 10oz grilled Picanha steak, fries, Brandy Peppercorn sauce, chimichurri.

items.name: Moroccan Curry Chicken
items.description: Braised Moroccan cinnamon curry chicken. Onion, carrots, cinnamon curry chicken jus, smoked paprika rice.

items.name: Lamb Shank
items.description: Saffron and cinnamon braised lamb shank, curry and raisin rice, lamb jus, orange and pomegranate molasses.

items.name: Baklava Cheesecake
items.description: Honey cheesecake, phyllo and pistachio crust. Topped with crusted baklava. Crème Anglais.

items.name: Tiramisu
items.description: Lady fingers drenched in espresso, Kahlua, brandy, Frangelico and Bailey's Irish Cream. Layers of sweet mascarpone.

items.name: Crème Brûlée
items.description: Made with real Bourbon vanilla beans, topped with caramelized sugar and fresh berries.

items.name: Gelato & Sorbet
items.description: Three rotating selections. Choose two of any. Check with your server for this week's scoops.

items.name: Chocolate Ganache Cake
items.description: Plant-based. Brownie bottom topped with decadent chocolate ganache.

items.name: Banana Bread Cake
items.description: Banana bread cake, chocolate lava.
